title: Gmail node fails with 'Precondition check failed' error
symptom: After updating n8n, the Gmail node throws a 'Precondition check failed' error when attempting to send emails.
root_cause: The error occurs due to stricter security policies applied to Google Workspace accounts compared to standard Gmail accounts. These policies can prevent certain actions unless specific settings are adjusted.
fix_steps: Ask your Workspace admin to enable 'Less secure app access' for your account
Retry sending emails using the Gmail node
agent_instruction: Request your Workspace admin to enable 'Less secure app access' for your Google account.
